creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Why did you create www/librewolf/files/firefox.desktop.in instead of use included in sources?

2. Are you sure www/librewolf/files/patch-bug847568 applied without warnings?
Look like u reverse this change: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/diff/www/librewolf/files/patch-bug847568?id=7eb3b6238dea2ea5edf847c6b87484901b4356e4

3. Did you copied www/librewolf/files/patch-libwebrtc-generated from www/firefox/files/patch-libwebrtc-generated?

4. Attach plz patch-libwebrtc-generated and patch-bug847568 as separate files.
